allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Calibre Bulk Search app with OneDrive-compatible config files

- Renamed .env to config.env for OneDrive compatibility
- Updated all documentation \(CLAUDE.md, README.md\)
- FastAPI backend with async search functionality
- Multi-strategy search with SceneNZBs integration
- Bootstrap 5 frontend

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Killing PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output "Port 8000 frei: $\(\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) -eq $null\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Killing PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($null -eq $c\) { Write-Output "Port 8000 ist frei" } else { Write-Output "Noch belegt von PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" })

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 25584 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($null -eq $c\) { Write-Output "Port 8000 ist frei" } else { Write-Output "Noch belegt von PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)"; Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output "Jetzt frei: $\(\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) -eq $null\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($null -eq $c\) { Write-Output "Port 8000 ist frei - bereit zum Start" } else { Write-Output "Noch belegt von PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)"; try { Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Id,ProcessName } catch { Write-Output "PID $\($c.OwningProcess\) existiert nicht mehr \(stale\)" } })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "LISTEN 8000 -> PID $\($c.OwningProcess\) Name=$\($p.ProcessName\) Start=$\($p.StartTime\)" }; Write-Output "--- Alle python-Prozesse:"; Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)

PowerShell(foreach \($id in 4144,18972,25344,20572,20764\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Beendet PID $id" } catch { Write-Output "PID $id schon weg" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output \("Port 8000 frei: " + \($null -eq $c\)\))
Bash(git commit -m 'Add Calibre server authentication and Docker/Portainer deployment *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Make host port configurable via HOST_PORT \(default 8085\) *)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output \("Port frei: " + \($null -eq \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\)\))
